title: OTBWG - Farmer's Delight - Bark Cutting Compat
description: Adds Compatibility Between Oh The Biomes We've Gone & Farmer's Delight
body:
Adds Support Between [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone) & [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

[CurseForge Version Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone-farmers-delight-bark)

[Fabric Version of Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)

Normally, when you try to cut modded wood types with a cutting board, a message appears saying, 'Doesn't seem cuttable...' However, with this datapack, it simply cuts the wood and gives you bark!

Both Mods are Required!

Types:

- Aspen,

- Baobab,

- Blue Enchanted,

- Cika,

- Cypress,

- Ebony,

- Fir,

- Florus Stem,

- Green Enchanted,

- Holly,

- Ironwood,

- Jacaranda,

- Mahogany,

- Maple,

- Palm,

- Palo Verde,

- Pine,

- Rainbow Eucalyptus,

- Redwood,

- Sakura,

- Skyris,

- White Mangrove,

- Willow,

- Witch Hazel,

- Zelkova.

All Types have:

- Door,

- Hanging Sign,

- Log,

- Sign,

- Trapdoor,

- And Wood Types!

- Also there are dye types from the flowers!

# THIS IS A DATAPACK!

How to Download:

1. Download the file.

2. Add it to the datapacks folder or use a loader (links below).

3. Start your world.

Links:

- [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi)

- [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader)

- [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)

Note: If you have any questions, please ask in the Comments section of the Datapack!

Note 2# There is currently a compatibility issue with [Regions Unexplored](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/regions-unexplored-farmers-delight-compat-forge), [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-biomes-o-plenty) and [Blue Skies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/blue-skies-farmers-delight-bark-cutting-compat). I'm trying my best, but i dont know how to fix the issue!
